run_a.command: cd build-release && PYTHONPATH=.:../python uv run python ../scripts/train.py --cache-dir ../cache/mes/ --bar-size 1000 --execution-cost --policy-arch 256,256 --activation relu --ent-coef 0.05 --learning-rate 0.001 --shuffle-split --seed 42 --total-timesteps 2000000 --checkpoint-freq 500000 --output-dir ../results/exp-002-execution-cost-ablation/run-a

run_b.command: cd build-release && PYTHONPATH=.:../python uv run python ../scripts/train.py --cache-dir ../cache/mes/ --bar-size 1000 --policy-arch 256,256 --activation relu --ent-coef 0.05 --learning-rate 0.001 --shuffle-split --seed 42 --total-timesteps 2000000 --checkpoint-freq 500000 --output-dir ../results/exp-002-execution-cost-ablation/run-b

run_c.command: cd build-release && PYTHONPATH=.:../python uv run python ../scripts/train.py --cache-dir ../cache/mes/ --bar-size 1000 --policy-arch 256,256 --activation relu --ent-coef 0.05 --learning-rate 0.001 --shuffle-split --seed 42 --train-days 199 --total-timesteps 2000000 --checkpoint-freq 500000 --output-dir ../results/exp-002-execution-cost-ablation/run-c
